task_completion.description: Open the initial base.slvs file in SolveSpace
task_completion.visual_evidence: SolveSpace application window is open displaying the original base plate 3D model.

task_completion.description: Draw a 22.2 mm diameter center hole on the top face
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sketch on the top face of the plate showing a large center circle. Look for a dimension constraint of 22.2 (diameter) or 11.1 (radius).

task_completion.description: Draw four 3.2 mm diameter mounting holes arranged in a square with 31.04 mm spacing
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four smaller circles drawn around the center hole. Look for dimension constraints showing 3.2 (diameter) or 1.6 (radius), and spacing constraints of 31.04 (distance) or 15.52 (offset from center).

task_completion.description: Extrude the drawn holes as a cut through the plate
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D model shows the five holes passing completely through the base plate (using an extrude difference/cut operation).

task_completion.description: Save the modified project to nema17_base.slvs
task_completion.visual_evidence: SolveSpace 'Save As' dialog or window title showing 'nema17_base.slvs' being saved in the /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/ directory.
SolveSpace 'Export' dialog or a file manager window showing 'nema17_base.stl' being created in the /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to perform the CAD operations
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the SolveSpace application (mouse clicks, tool selections, sketch editing), rather than modifying the SLVS file directly via a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace export functionality to create the STL
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Export' dialog in SolveSpace is visible, rather than the agent using a terminal command to copy a pre-existing file or mock the STL.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the dimensions into the SolveSpace constraint dialogs
integrity.visual_evidence: The property panel or text input boxes in SolveSpace show the specific numbers (22.2, 3.2, 31.04, or their halves) being typed or applied to the sketch.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output SLVS file is '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/nema17_base.slvs' and the STL file is '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/nema17_base.stl'. The NEMA 17 mounting pattern requires a center hole diameter of 22.2 mm (radius 11.1 mm), four mounting holes with a diameter of 3.2 mm (radius 1.6 mm), and a center-to-center spacing of 31.04 mm (offset 15.52 mm from the origin).
